titlestmt.titleproper: Vice President for Academic Affairs records4-7-1253

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-06-05 00:07:36 -0400.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Vice President for Academic Affairs records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Vice President for Academic Affairs

accessrestrict.head: Restrictions on Access
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Includes material on education legislation; education research; scholarships and financial aid; academic departments and divisions of the University; admissions budgets and correspondence; University budgets; University libraries; R.O.T.C.; campus planning; academic associations; research grants; faculty and staff; minutes of meetings; Board of Trustees records; reports; and other records of the Vice President for Academic Affairs; includes files of Stuart M. Brown.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Cornell University. Vice President for Academic Affairs. Records, #4253. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Campus planning.
Education.
Educational law and legislation.
controlaccess.corpname: United States. Army. Reserve Officers' Training Corps

New York State College proficiency exams
President's Study Committee for Home Economics

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Handwritten note on paper box list states that file was sent to Day Hall.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notebooks contain pre-lim materials to prepare reports

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This is a sub-committee of the Committee on Academic Affairs
